51.reason: The loop condition should be b < t, not b <= t, to avoid accessing out-of-bounds element k[t].

53.reason: When b = t-1, k[b+1] accesses k[t], which is out of bounds and may cause undefined behavior.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  When b == t-1, k[b+1] accesses k[t], which is out of bounds and may cause undefined behavior.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.2 , reason:  // Error: k[b+1] accesses element beyond the sorted array when b == t, causing undefined behavior
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.125 , reason:  Merging logic is flawed; it only handles adjacent pairs and fails for three or more terms with the same exponent.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Accesses k[b+1] when b can be equal to t, which is beyond valid index t-1]
